name: Trout
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first three ingredients in a non-reactive pan.
2. Simmer for about 10 minutes.
3. If using figs, steep them for about half an hour, then discard before reducing the mixture by half.
4. Brush the butterflied trout with the sauce and broil until cooked through (do not overcook). You can also grill the fish if desired.
5. Return the figs to the pan after the reduction and enjoy. This recipe is low in calories (WW: 4 points, ~40 calories) and easy to prepare.
